creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: dhn
Date: Tue Dec 17 19:33:59 2013
New Revision: 336757
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/336757

Log:
  - Update to 2.2.1
  
  PR:		ports/180148
  Submitted by:	Steve Wills <swills@FreeBSD.org>

Added:
  head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/files/
  head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/files/patch-versions   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/Makefile
  head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/distinfo
  head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/pkg-descr

Modified: head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 19:12:27 2013	(r336756)
+++ head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/Makefile	Tue Dec 17 19:33:59 2013	(r336757)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	termtter
-PORTVERSION=	1.11.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.2.1
 CATEGORIES=	net-im rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
@@ -11,15 +11,15 @@ COMMENT=	Terminal based Twitter client
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-json>=1.1.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-json \
 		rubygem-termcolor>=1.0.0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/rubygem-termcolor \
-		rubygem-rubytter>=1.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-rubytter \
+		rubygem-rubytter>=1.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/net/rubygem-rubytter \
 		rubygem-highline>=1.5.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-highline \
-		rubygem-notify>=0.2.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-notify
+		rubygem-notify>=0.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-notify
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
 USE_RAKE=	yes
 RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/termtter
+PLIST_FILES=	bin/termtter bin/termtter_frame
 
 NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/distinfo	Tue Dec 17 19:12:27 2013	(r336756)
+++ head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/distinfo	Tue Dec 17 19:33:59 2013	(r336757)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/termtter-1.11.0.gem) = 703c2535b59468482aed3748ba07600611d89e373ff7f3b6fa3532db3409d807
-SIZE (rubygem/termtter-1.11.0.gem) = 1504768
+SHA256 (rubygem/termtter-2.2.1.gem) = 316bac3539fa9ccc859df0ecc6fe2e09b4e373f4ac8d86384f0baacfdc37b8e2
+SIZE (rubygem/termtter-2.2.1.gem) = 1505280

Added: head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/files/patch-versions
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/files/patch-versions	Tue Dec 17 19:33:59 2013	(r336757)
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+--- termtter-2.2.1.gemspec.orig	2013-07-01 03:35:35.630666391 +0000
++++ termtter-2.2.1.gemspec	2013-07-01 03:35:36.659666334 +0000
+@@ -33,28 +33,28 @@
+     requirements:
+     - - ~>
+       - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: 1.5.0
++        version: 1.6.0
+   type: :runtime
+   prerelease: false
+   version_requirements: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+     requirements:
+     - - ~>
+       - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: 1.5.0
++        version: 1.6.0
+ - !ruby/object:Gem::Dependency
+   name: termcolor
+   requirement: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+     requirements:
+     - - ~>
+       - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: 1.0.0
++        version: 1.2.0
+   type: :runtime
+   prerelease: false
+   version_requirements: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement
+     requirements:
+     - - ~>
+       - !ruby/object:Gem::Version
+-        version: 1.0.0
++        version: 1.2.0
+ - !ruby/object:Gem::Dependency
+   name: rubytter
+   requirement: !ruby/object:Gem::Requirement

Modified: head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 17 19:12:27 2013	(r336756)
+++ head/net-im/rubygem-termtter/pkg-descr	Tue Dec 17 19:33:59 2013	(r336757)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 Termtter is a Terminal based Twitter client.
 
-WWW: http://termtter.org/
+WWW: http://termtter.github.io/
